summary: Verified video removal and mobile scrolling fixes on Blendlink landing page. All 8 requirements passed: video element completely removed, no video caption, hero buttons present, touch-action: pan-y applied, no horizontal scroll, -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch in CSS, hero text preserved, features section visible.
critical_code_review_comments: Video element and VideoHero component completely removed from Landing.jsx
CSS scroll fixes properly implemented: touch-action: pan-y on html/body/buttons, -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch, overflow-x: hidden
Hero section preserved with 'Start Earning Today' and 'I Have an Account' buttons
All hero text preserved: 'Social, Shop, Play & Earn Rewards', 'Connect with friends...'
Features section 'Everything You Need' visible and accessible
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video completely removed from landing page. Mobile scrolling fixes verified working on 390x844 viewport. All CSS scroll properties correctly applied.

video_element_removed.details: No [data-testid='hero-video'] element found, no <video> elements on page

video_caption_removed.details: No 'See Blendlink in action' text found on page

hero_buttons_present.details: Both 'Start Earning Today' and 'I Have an Account' buttons found with correct data-testid attributes

touch_action_pan_y.details: touch-action: pan-y applied to html, body, and buttons

no_horizontal_scroll.details: scrollWidth=390, clientWidth=390, overflow-x: hidden on html/body

hero_text_preserved.details: 'Social, Shop, Play & Earn Rewards' and 'Connect with friends' text found

features_section_visible.details: 'Everything You Need' heading found and visible
